sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports intermittent dizziness for one week, worse when standing. He denies chest pain, dyspnea, or syncope. He also reports a mild sore throat.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 90/60 mmHg. Heart rate is 88 bpm, regular. Neurologic exam is unremarkable except for the reported dizziness. Throat is mildly erythematous.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are most consistent with orthostatic dizziness and a mild upper respiratory infection.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: I will order a tilt table test to evaluate for orthostatic hypotension. I will also prescribe ibuprofen 200mg every 6 hours for the sore throat. Advise patient to hydrate well.
